name: tmux Workstation Builder
description: Composes a tmux workspace (layout + panes) into a ready-to-paste one-liner. Static site, no backend. State is set via URL query params, so an agent composes a link and hands it to the user.

skills.name: compose_workspace
skills.description: Compose a tmux workspace from layout + panes. Returns the generated one-liner and a shareable URL.

input.instructions: Build a URL with query params: name, path, layout (alias or index), detached, panes (pipe-separated). Open it to read the generated command from element #output.

skills.name: explore_options
skills.description: Discover available layouts, commands, and templates.

input.instructions: Fetch /options.json for the full structured catalogue, or /llms.txt for the human/agent-readable manual.
